violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -The top of the ice-making pan (where the ice is built-up) for the ice machine is in need of cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -The kitchen staff is using a black rolling cart in the kitchen and the bottom shelf has a build up and in need of cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Large pizza boxes are sitting face-up on top of a holding unit.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Shelves in the freezer and back storage room are made of unsealed wood and 2x4. Advised Heather to seal shelves.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving used to store to-go items is wood that is not sealed. Shelving that is used to store food and items used in food service should be sealed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Fan blade covers in the walk-in cooler and freezers were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Hole found in the wall near the time clock exposing studs and piping. Walls should be properly maintained.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Ceiling in the storage area is wood that has not been sealed. Ceilings should be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
